lists.0: LED is light when UPA is OFF
lists.1: LED is light when UPA is ON
Only once in Power ON cycle

lists.0: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

calib_config.Vehicle_Type.comment: define the vehicle type used in the configuration (DID$2044) or in the calibration block

calib_config.NumberOfSensors.comment: Define the number of sensor to be used in the calibration block

calib_config.calib_config.comment: Parameter to define if we use or not the calibration and so the DID $2044

SessionName.comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level OutOfRange/0 adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed / blocked

lists.0: No possible classification about the type of fault
lists.20: Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
lists.21: Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

lists.3: DriverInLoopType, DID $2060 is configured as PushButton
lists.4: APA is configured for 4/6/8/10 channel system
lists.5: Automatic transmission is not configured for HFPB/APK/FAPK
lists.6: relation between APAVariant and APASwitchMode is not consistent
lists.7: AD2, DID$3200 is configured with for 4/6/8/10 channel system

CalibrationNumber.Vehicle_Type.comment: define the vehicle type used in the configuration (DID$2044) or in the calibration block

CalibrationNumber.NumberOfSensors.comment: Define the number of sensor to be used in the calibration block

SupplierData_Sonar_LL_part1.comment: DID use to read the Sonar LL tuning value in plant

SupplierData_Sonar_LL_part2.comment: DID use to read the Sonar LL tuning value in plant

RoutineControlType.comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.
